value.found_quote: Today we’re launching AgentKit, a complete set of tools for developers and enterprises to build, deploy, and optimize agents.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's announcement of AgentKit, explicitly describing it as a launched set of tools for building agents. Note: while a June 3, 2026 update says Agent Builder and Evals (components) are being wound down, AgentKit overall is described as launched/available, with ChatKit and new Evals capabilities generally available.
